title: 20-year-old from Knysna passes away in Greece
description: KNYSNA NEWS - Condolences have been flooding...
bodyText:
KNYSNA NEWS - Condolences have been flooding in since news of the death of former Knysna High School learner, Benjamin Bezuidenhout broke.


> The 20-year-old went missing on Thursday last week after going snorkeling off the coast of Greece in the vicinity of the island of Kefalonia.


Bezuidenhout was working on a catamaran for a boat company at the time of the incident.

Read more on www.knysnaplettherald.com

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
